headline: Goldman Sachs Upgrades W. R. Berkley (WRB) Stock to Buy
summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE:WRB) is one of the Most Undervalued Long Term Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 8, Goldman Sachs upgraded W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE:WRB)’s stock to “Buy” from “Neutral”, lifting the price objective to $73 from the prior target of $71. As per the firm, the company’s underwriting margins and […]

headline: W. R. Berkley Stock: Is WRB Underperforming the Financial Sector?
summary: W. R. Berkley has trailed the broader financial over the past year, and analysts are maintaining a cautious outlook on its longer-term growth trajectory.

headline: W. R. Berkley: Strong Underwriting, But Limited Margin Of Safety
summary: Analyze W.R. Berkley (WRB): strong underwriting, 20.8% ROE and 2.8% yield, but premium valuation and sector risks.
